name: Okta Active Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects active okta accounts that do not meet MFA requirements.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(u.mfa_enrolled, false) = false
remediation: Require MFA enrollment and enforcement for all active accounts.
